name: Battle: Mission of War Talent Demo

reviews.review_title: As a game dev, this sucks
reviews.review_description:
This game is horrible. Ai generated thumbnail, ai generated name, ai generated description, menu music sounds like someone just died, and worst of all, the running system. This game has a system where if you press the grips and swing your arms, you run REDICULOUSLY FAST. Unfortunately, this system also turns on when you are holding a gun, so whenever you try to just normally walk while holding a gun, you go all over the place. Not to mention half the game is behind a paywall anything. You couldn’t PAY ME to play through this whole game, much less spend an hour of minimum wage on it.

Response to Dev’s response: The fact that a good half the game is AI generated shows that you won’t even put the effort in to write your own description. It feels sloppy and unprofessional. Why would I pay money for something that I could easily generate? On the running system: Yes, but it’s an absolute pain to have to press that every time, and sometimes it doesn’t even work. When I was going through the tutorial, it wasn’t working at all.

developer_response.body:
Hi Seth123jojo, we consider don't your review serious, AI generated! What you find personal problem in that? 

Regarding, your bad experience in run-mode switch, Actually we have mentioned in tutorial that you can switch "RUN-MODE" before shooting. SWITCH mode can be changed by left button JOYSTICK CLICK.  though we will try to make it more ease in upcoming version. Of course, you tried is demo version not a premium version.

It I seems you are so called game developer. because simple thing in game you don't get.

Regarding your Reply: We don't do copy past content of AI, We put effort to generate best content and take help from AI, We don't fill it unprofessional. It might be your personal thoughts to consider AI content to see unprofessional. "RUN-MODE" tutorial is working with just simple instruction to follow.

reviews.review_description: Very well developed game with stunning graphics. Once you play this game you will think that you are in battle ground with tons of weapons to defeat enemies.i am absolutely in love with this game.whenever I feel stressed, I will wear my quest 2 and start playing this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you Satish, Glad that you love the game. Keep playing we are till working on it to make more mission. Have more fun!
